prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on ethylene (C2H4, 6 atoms) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS singlet). Single-point on user-supplied geometry. SCF converged in 6 cycles. HOMO = −7.6155818 eV (index 7), LUMO = −0.17986527 eV (index 8), HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV. Total electronic energy = −78.623486 Hartree. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. No warnings reported (clean run). Koopmans-derived vertical IP ≈ 7.6156 eV, vertical EA ≈ 0.1799 eV.
